name: Chunky Chicken Rice Soup
recipeInstructions: 1. In a skillet, fry the chicken in hot oil until browned. Add the broth, water, thawed frozen vegetables and seasonings. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 5 minutes. Stir in the Minute Rice and dried parsley; cover, remove from heat. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
